buttons.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 shadow-sm font-medium px-4 py-2 rounded-lg transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 font-medium px-4 py-2 rounded-lg transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-100 hover:text-slate-900 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg transition-all
buttons.destructive: bg-red-50 text-red-600 hover:bg-red-100 font-medium px-4 py-2 rounded-lg transition-all

cards.default: bg-white border border-slate-100 rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300 p-6
cards.stat: flex flex-col justify-between h-full bg-white border border-slate-100 rounded-xl p-6 shadow-sm relative overflow-hidden group

inputs.default: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-white file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-slate-500 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-slate-950 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

badges.base: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-950 focus:ring-offset-2

login.layout: Split screen. Left: 50% width Image with heavy overlay and quote/branding. Right: 50% width Form centered.

dashboard.layout: Sidebar Layout. Fixed Left Sidebar (w-64), Fixed Topbar (h-16), Scrollable Main Content.

bon_form.upload_zone: border-2 border-dashed border-slate-300 rounded-xl p-8 text-center hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors cursor-pointer flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-2

universal_guidelines: Use 'Plus Jakarta Sans' for all headings to give a modern Indonesian tech vibe.
Use 'Inter' for body text for maximum legibility.
Do NOT use gradients for backgrounds, keep it flat and clean white/slate-50.
Ensure all interactive elements have 'data-testid' attributes.
Use Shadcn UI components but override the default 'radius' to 0.75rem (rounded-xl) via Tailwind classes.
For the 'Status' column in tables, ALWAYS use the Badge component with the specific color mappings defined in design_system.components.badges.
The 'Pegawai' role sees 'Submit Bon', 'Atasan' sees 'Approve Bon', 'Finance' sees 'Finalize Bon'. UI must adapt accordingly.
